creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
qemu fails to build with DOCS option disabled.

gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/capstone'
sh /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/scripts/hxtool -t < /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/qemu-options.hx > qemu-options.texi
sh /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/scripts/hxtool -t < /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/hmp-commands.hx > qemu-monitor.texi
sh /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/scripts/hxtool -t < /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/hmp-commands-info.hx > qemu-monitor-info.texi
sh /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/scripts/hxtool -t < /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/qemu-img-cmds.hx > qemu-img-cmds.texi
perl -Ww -- /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/scripts/texi2pod.pl -I docs -I . -I . "-DVERSION=2.12.1" qemu-nbd.texi qemu-nbd.8.pod && pod2man --utf8 --section=8 --center=" " --release=" " qemu-nbd.8.pod > qemu-nbd.8
perl -Ww -- /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/scripts/texi2pod.pl -I docs -I . -I . "-DVERSION=2.12.1" qemu-ga.texi qemu-ga.8.pod && pod2man --utf8 --section=8 --center=" " --release=" " qemu-ga.8.pod > qemu-ga.8
perl -Ww -- /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/scripts/texi2pod.pl -I docs -I  -I docs "-DVERSION=2.12.1"  docs/qemu-qmp-ref.7.pod && pod2man --utf8 --section=7 --center=" " --release=" " docs/qemu-qmp-ref.7.pod > docs/qemu-qmp-ref.7
perl -Ww -- /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/scripts/texi2pod.pl -I docs -I  -I docs "-DVERSION=2.12.1"  docs/qemu-ga-ref.7.pod && pod2man --utf8 --section=7 --center=" " --release=" " docs/qemu-ga-ref.7.pod > docs/qemu-ga-ref.7
LC_ALL= LANG=C LC_CTYPE=en_US.UTF-8 /usr/local/bin/python2.7 -B /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/scripts/qapi-gen.py -o qga/qapi-generated -p "qga-" /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/qemu/work/qemu-2.12.1/qga/qapi-schema.json
